name: @ehrbase-ui/openehr-am
description: openEHR Archetype Model — ADL 1.4 / OPT 1.4 (matches EHRbase 2.31.0; not AOM2 2.3.0, per ADR-0032 addendum). Minimal: the ADL 1.4 archetype-id + node-code (at/ac) identifier layer backing the ADR-0016 catalogue and clinical-UI citations. Form consumption lives in @ehrbase-ui/openehr-web-template.
